title: Portolan Registry Catalog Entry
description: Schema for registering STAC catalogs in the Portolan Registry. All fields are required unless explicitly marked nullable.

url.description: The URL of the STAC catalog root. Must be a valid URI ending with 'catalog.json'.

title.description: Human-readable title for the catalog. Should be concise but descriptive.

description.description: A brief description of the catalog's contents and purpose.

maintainer.description: Name of the person or organization responsible for maintaining this catalog.

contact.description: Contact email address for the catalog maintainer.

access.description: Access level for the catalog. 'public' means no authentication required; 'authenticated' means credentials are needed.

items.description: A lowercase kebab-case tag for categorizing the catalog.

tags.description: Tags for categorizing and discovering the catalog. Must contain at least one tag in lowercase kebab-case format.

submitted.description: Date the catalog was submitted to the registry in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

validation.description: Validation status and results for the catalog.

tier.description: Validation tier: 'unvalidated' means no checks performed, 'basic' means STAC validity checked, 'full' means all Portolan compatibility checks passed.

last_checked.description: ISO 8601 datetime of the last validation check. Null if never checked.

stac_valid.description: Whether the catalog passes STAC specification validation. Null if not yet checked.

has_versions_json.description: Whether the catalog includes a versions.json file for version tracking. Null if not yet checked.

has_portolan_dir.description: Whether the catalog includes a .portolan directory with Portolan-specific metadata. Null if not yet checked.
